overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along elevated pedestrian walkways in a futuristic neon-lit city at dusk. The character passes various holographic billboards and transitions from open-air walkways to covered sections overlooking busy streets below, ending at a large Nicola soda advertisement.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated walkway, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in gray jacket walking ahead of the character

entered.detail: bright yellow safety railing lining the right side of the elevated walkway
large vertical holographic billboard displaying 'SECURITY YOU CAN TRUST' with a masked face
various illuminated advertisements on distant buildings including 'Merry Christmas' signage
tall futuristic towers with glowing windows forming the city skyline

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open-air elevated pedestrian walkway at dusk, with yellow railings on the right and holographic billboards visible ahead. The RCS security billboard dominates the left side as the character approaches, while the futuristic Night City skyline stretches into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: glass-fronted commercial corridor transitioning to covered walkway

events.description: approaching the entrance to a covered section of the elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: walking past modern glass buildings while approaching the covered walkway entrance

notable_agents.action: woman in white shirt and shorts walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: modern building with reflective glass facade and illuminated interior windows
overhead metal structure with integrated neon lighting beginning to cover the path

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the walkway as the open sky gives way to a covered section. A modern glass commercial building lines the left side while the yellow railing continues on the right. The RCS billboard disappears behind as the character approaches the covered walkway entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered elevated walkway overlooking multi-level highway

events.description: character pauses to look down over the railing at the traffic on the multi-level highway below

agents.ego_description: walking under the covered section and looking down at the traffic below

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead under the covered walkway

entered.detail: linear yellow neon light strips running along the ceiling of the covered walkway
multi-level highway with moving vehicle traffic visible below the walkway

segments.scene_description: Under the covered walkway, yellow neon strips illuminate the ceiling as the character walks above a busy multi-level highway. The character glances down at the sparse traffic moving below while futuristic skyscrapers rise in the background. The enclosed space creates a contrast between the artificial lighting and the darkening sky visible at the edges.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway approach to large holographic advertisement

events.description: turning right corner to face the large Nicola billboard at the end of the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking toward the large Nicola billboard advertisement at the end of the walkway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near the base of the Nicola billboard

entered.detail: massive illuminated billboard displaying 'ニコーラ' (Nicola) with retro-style woman in hat advertisement

segments.scene_description: The character turns a corner and approaches the end of the walkway, where a massive Nicola soda billboard dominates the view. The walkway narrows with yellow railings on both sides leading toward the bright advertisement. Other pedestrians are visible near the billboard as the character completes the approach.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along an elevated pedestrian walkway that transitions from an open-air vista into a neon-lit covered corridor. It begins with the character walking past a dominant RCS security billboard under a darkening dusk sky, with the sprawling Night City skyline stretching into the distance. As the character advances, the open sky gives way to a covered section, shifting the perspective from the wide horizon to a modern glass commercial building lining the path. The scene then moves beneath a ceiling illuminated by yellow neon strips, where the camera glances down at a busy multi-level highway before turning a final corner. The walkway narrows between yellow railings, leading the character toward a massive, brightly lit Nicola soda advertisement surrounded by other pedestrians.
